subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: Update dependencies in the Forc dependencies directory

options.name: -p
options.description: Path to the project, if not specified, current working directory will be used

options.name: -d
options.description: Dependency to be updated. If not set, all dependencies will be updated

options.name: -c
options.description: Checks if the dependencies have newer versions. Won't actually perform the update, will output which ones are up-to-date and outdated
